headlines.title: Apptio co-founders reunite to launch enterprise AI startup Thira with $21M in funding led by Madrona
Indian AI coding startup Emergent becomes a unicorn with $130M Series C
Fintech Funding Surges 23% In H1 2026 As Investors Concentrate Their Bets On AI And Financial Infrastructure
Backed by $60M in funding, Oak steps out of stealth to fix the identity mess that AI agents are making worse
Venture funding drops in Seattle area as AI boom reshapes startup world
Neo Security, a cybersecurity startup founded by ex-SentinelOne execs and currently in stealth, raised $50M+, after a $25M seed in 2025 led by a16z and Merlin (Meir Orbach/CTech)
Neko raises $700m Series C: ‘We now have 100k members and are profitable at clinic level’
Lawsuit claims Meta's layoff decisions were made by AI, not humans
This founder sold his startup to Klarna for €110m. Now he's raised €12m to build again
Hermes agent maker Nous Research in talks for new funding at $1.5B valuation
Israel-based Oak, which is building an AI-native identity access management system, comes out of stealth with a $60M seed (Anna Heim/TechCrunch)
Nokia plans to sell its AI-driven RAN platform, developed with Nvidia, to mobile operators by 2027, aiming for a 100% increase in spectrum efficiency by 2028 (Paula Doenecke/Bloomberg)
Delaware wants to give AI agents their own legal identity
China's cyberspace regulator says Apple Intelligence has been registered for use on iPhones in the country; Alibaba says the service will use its Qwen model (Reuters)
European biotech mapped: 90 startups reshaping medicine
Startup Spotlight: Hedgehog bets that open-source networking will power the next generation of AI clouds
Vieu launches AI-ready map of business relationships, challenging tech incumbents
Google revamps image search for its 25th anniversary with more images and more AI
Canva launches Code 2.0, offering AI website building to every user — including free accounts
So Far, 2026 Is A Solid Year For Cybersecurity Startup Funding
ACRouter picks the smartest AI model per task, beating Opus-only setups by 2.6x on cost
Archives to avatars: Famed historian is moved by Microsoft’s AI-powered Theodore Roosevelt at new library
Corporate Venture Capital Is Splitting In Two
Abu Dhabi already runs its government on AI
